scoring._summary: Analyzed 20 scored results across 1 scenario(s) and 4 condition(s). Top condition: twining-lite (mean=84.5).

conditions._summary: 1/6 condition pairs significantly different after Holm-Bonferroni correction; 1/3 pairs vs 'baseline' are significant.

coordination.summary: Analyzed 240 sessions across 4 conditions. Overall engagement rate: 50% (120/240 sessions used Twining). Non-engagement flagged for: baseline, shared-markdown.

power_analysis.verdict: effect (d=1.79) is below detectable threshold (MDES=2.02) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect
effect (d=0.97) is below detectable threshold (MDES=2.02) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect

at_5_iterations.note: Going from 3→5 iterations costs ~66% more but detects medium effects (d≈0.6) at 80% power

harness_summary.headline: twining-lite ranks #1 with 84.5 composite (+8.0 vs baseline, large effect, p<0.05)

items.message: Reduce tool surface area: full-twining (82.1) scores lower than twining-lite (84.5)
Insensitive scorer: dimension 'finalQuality' has only 4.4-point spread across conditions
High scorer variance (CV>20%) in 1 scenario x condition pairs for dimensions: decisionConsistency
Inconclusive comparisons (full-twining, shared-markdown): observed effects are below detectable threshold — cannot distinguish from noise at current sample size
Escalating cost in 'sprint-simulation' x 'baseline': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.033)
Escalating cost in 'sprint-simulation' x 'twining-lite': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.027)
